midnight-ink.$description: Midnight Ink — Primary brand color for headings, logo, emphasized text, nav labels, and icon strokes — a near-black with a faint violet cast that reads as ink rather than pure black against the cream canvas

obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Dark elevated surface for cards, headers, and contained panels. Do not promote it to the primary CTA color

graphite.$description: Graphite — Primary body and heading text, dark card fills, and icon fills — the workhorse near-black with the faintest cool cast

charcoal.$description: Charcoal — Secondary dark surfaces and muted borders for inverted panels

steel.$description: Steel — Mid-gray for supporting UI marks, icon fills, and medium borders

silver.$description: Silver — Lighter mid-gray for tertiary text, placeholder copy, and decorative fills

fog.$description: Fog — Subtle border tone for ghost controls and quiet dividers

mist.$description: Mist — The system's structural hairline — dominant border, divider, and table-rule color across every layout context

parchment.$description: Parchment — Warm sage-cream wash used as the hero background and as the secondary button fill — gives the page its printed-paper atmosphere

linen.$description: Linen — Card and elevated surface background — one step off the page to create depth without shadows

paper.$description: Paper — Pure white reserved for inverted buttons, tag chips, and high-contrast list items where Mist would be too muted

slate-link.$description: Slate Link — Default link and breadcrumb text color, distinct from body text gray

flatfilediatypevariable.$description: FlatfileDiatypeVariable — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

flatfile-diatype-variable.$description: Primary UI and body sans — nav links, buttons, body copy, small labels, and card content. The variable axis lets the system shift between neutral body weight and slightly heavier button weight without changing family.

flatfile-diatype-static.$description: Display and section heading sizes. Uses tighter tracking as size grows — the 60px display sits at -0.0320em, pulling letters into a compact editorial block.

source-serif-4.$description: Reserved exclusively for customer-quote hero text in testimonial cards. The serif italic-leaning humanist voice creates a print-publication contrast against the otherwise sans-only system.

sharp-grotesk.$description: Secondary display face for product-feature subheadings where a more condensed, technical voice is needed — used sparingly to break up the Diatype rhythm.

booton.$description: Booton — detected in extracted data but not described by AI

parchment-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Hero section wash — the warm sage-cream that gives the page its editorial paper feel.

paper.$description: Surface level 1: True-white body sections, inverted button faces, tag chips.

linen.$description: Surface level 2: Card and panel surfaces that sit one layer above the page.

obsidian.$description: Surface level 3: Footer band and filled CTA pill — the deepest surface in the system.
